sections.heading: Person and number.
sections.content: Pronominal agent and patient prefixes occur immediately following the modal prefixes [table 7:11, 12, 15]. Skiri distinguishes two persons—first and second—as well as three numbers—singular, dual, and plural. In both the dual and plural numbers there is a further distinction between inclusive (including the person spoken to) and exclusive (excluding the person spoken to) [table 7:11-12, 15]. There is, in addition, an obviative (OBV) prefix ir- that designates an indefinite third-person agent or a reversal in third-person agent and patient [table 7:13].

morphemes_mentioned.label: obviative (OBV) prefix
morphemes_mentioned.meaning: designates an indefinite third-person agent or a reversal in third-person agent and patient
morphemes_mentioned.notes: Occurs as an agent prefix for obviative forms, and as a patient prefix for obviative forms (in combination with a-)

morphemes_mentioned.label: DU (dual number)
morphemes_mentioned.meaning: dual number for both agent and patient
morphemes_mentioned.notes: precedes the modal prefix; also part of the combination si- DU and ir- COLL.PL

morphemes_mentioned.label: plural agent
morphemes_mentioned.meaning: first and second person agents in active, descriptive, and locative verbs

morphemes_mentioned.label: collective plural prefix
morphemes_mentioned.meaning: third person plural agents that are a group or single entity in active intransitive, descriptive, and locative verbs
morphemes_mentioned.notes: Distinct from the obviative ir-; also part of the combination si- DU and ir- COLL.PL

morphemes_mentioned.label: individuative plural prefix
morphemes_mentioned.meaning: third person plural agents that are individuals acting or existing separately in active intransitive, descriptive, and locative verbs
morphemes_mentioned.notes: Also used for 3.INAN.P (third person inanimate plural patient)

morphemes_mentioned.label: 3.P.COLL.A (third person collective plural agent)
morphemes_mentioned.notes: Used in active intransitive, descriptive, and locative verbs

morphemes_mentioned.label: 3.P.INDV.A (third person individuative plural agent)
morphemes_mentioned.notes: Used in active intransitive, descriptive, and locative verbs
